member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.ForkConfig
member.summary: Class that defines the ForkConfig.json file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.ForkConfig.LocationCodeToPort
member.summary: Gets or sets a mapping of location code to its designated port.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.InvalidPortException
member.summary: Exception which is thrown if the user provides an invalid port in their config.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.InvalidPortException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Message to set for this exception.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.InvalidPortException.#ctor(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod
member.summary: This test method allows for the creation of flows that are dedicated to specific location codes.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.ScVarCollection
member.summary: Defines the name of the SCVar collection.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.LocationCodeScVar
member.summary: Defines the name of the var for the TP location code.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.DefaultUserVarCollection
member.summary: Defines the "default" location to place uservars into.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.ConfigUserVar
member.summary: Defines a string user variable that holds a path to the ForkConfig.json.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.SharedStorageKeyForPort
member.summary: Some random key used to store the port into shared storage.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.SharedStorageKeyForTimestamp
member.summary: Some random key used to store the configuration's timestamp into shared storage.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.SharedStorageKeyForLocationCode
member.summary: Some random key used to store the last location code into SharedStorage.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService,Prime.FileService.IFileService,Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.Behavior
member.summary: Defines which parameters this test method will use for the exit port.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.Behavior.Config
member.summary: Use the "ForkConfig.json" configuration to determine the exit port.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.Behavior.Parameter
member.summary: Use the "LocationCodeToMatch" to determine the exit port.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.Bool
member.summary: True or false enum used to expose parameters that behave like booleans to TOS.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.Bool.True
member.summary: True.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.Bool.False
member.summary: False.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.LocationCodeToMatch
member.summary: Gets or sets a string that will match to this test program's location code.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.IsRegex
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the provided "LocationCodeToMatch" parameter is a RegEx, or the exact name of the location code to match to.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Fork.PrimeForkTestMethod.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that will determine how this FORK will determine its exit port.
